description: Configure the EMG Joystick widget for a motor imagery task using the EEG playback data from ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt. Map the joystick channels as follows: Right/+X to Channel 3, Left/-X to Channel 4, Up/+Y to Channel 1, and Down/-Y to Channel 2. Save a screenshot of the configured GUI to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/emg_joystick_config.png.
